seoTitle: North Narrabeen vs North Parramatta — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Narrabeen and North Parramatta. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Narrabeen vs North Parramatta: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Narrabeen and North Parramatta.
heading: North Narrabeen vs North Parramatta — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Narrabeen, New South Wales and North Parramatta, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Narrabeen has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to North Parramatta (50/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Narrabeen or North Parramatta safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Narrabeen has a flood risk score of 36/100, while North Parramatta scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Narrabeen scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. North Parramatta scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Narrabeen or North Parramatta?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Narrabeen has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
